basic_details.job_title: TISS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Officer, Senior Research Officer Posts
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate in Social Work/Social Sciences/Criminology/Law/Anthropology or related fields
qualification.details: Senior Research Officer: Postgraduate in Social Work/ Social Sciences, Criminology, Law, Anthropology, or related fields with a minimum of 2 years of research/field experience. Junior Research Officer: Postgraduate in Social Work/ Social Sciences, Criminology, Law, Anthropology, or related fields with a minimum of 6 months prior fieldwork or community work experience.

salary_details.details: Senior Research Officer: Rs. 52000 Per Month Junior Research Officer: Rs. 40000 Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TISS Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for TISS Project Staff Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Staff (Research Officers) positions at TISS is 25th June 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Staff at TISS?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Project Staff (Research Officers) positions advertised by the Tata Institute of Social Sciences for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Junior Research Officer position, candidates must have a Postgraduate degree in Social Work, Social Sciences, Criminology, Law, Anthropology, or related fields, along with at least 6 months of fieldwork or community work experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Senior Research Officer post will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 52,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for TISS Project Staff Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, according to the official notification, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the Project Staff (Research Officers) positions.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these TISS posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves an online application, followed by shortlisting of candidates based on their qualifications and experience, and finally an interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for these Project Staff positions?
faq.answer: The Project Staff (Research Officers) positions at TISS are offered on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. Which state is this TISS recruitment for?
faq.answer: This TISS recruitment drive is specifically for candidates based in or willing to work in Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from any state apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification mentions Gujarat as the state for this recruitment. While candidates from other states might be eligible based on qualifications, it's advisable to check the specific requirements in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF for TISS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download and review it thoroughly for complete details.
